index.title: Alexander Moiseev — AI Developer & Analyst
index.metaDescription: Alexander Moiseev — AI developer and analyst. Chat bots, AI agents and business automation on n8n.
index.heroDesc: I build smart assistants, chat bots, and automate processes using n8n, Python, and neural networks.
index.aboutP1: Hi! I'm a developer and analyst with 29 years of experience in the IT industry. My core competencies include building chat bots, AI agents, and AI assistants. I specialize in system integrations, workflow automation, and implementing neural network solutions.
index.aboutP2: My primary tool is the n8n platform, which allows rapidly connecting different services and models via API and MCP. I use Claude Code to accelerate development — an intelligent assistant for writing and refactoring code.
index.aboutP3: Beyond development, I handle analytics, architecture design, and optimizing interactions with neural models. I always strive to find the optimal solution and pay special attention to data security. I spend a lot of time testing — I bring every project to full completion, always keeping focus on quality.
index.skillPlatforms4: LLM: OpenAI, Claude, DeepSeek, GigaChat, Qwen, YandexGPT

billiard.title: Billiard Bot
billiard.subtitle: Telegram bot for booking tables at a club

psr.problem: Billiard club administrators spent up to 60% of their work time handling phone calls for table bookings. Clients couldn't always get through during peak hours.
psr.solution: Telegram bot with automatic display of available slots, online booking, and AI answers to frequently asked questions. Full integration with Google Calendar.
psr.result: 40% reduction in admin workload, booking speed reduced to 2 minutes, 24/7 operation without human involvement.

cards.title: View schedule
cards.desc: Client sees all available slots and tables for the selected date in real time

cards.title: Choose a specific table
cards.desc: Option to select a specific table or zone in the club with a layout view

cards.title: Instant confirmation
cards.desc: Bot confirms the booking and sends a confirmation with order details

cards.title: AI answers to questions
cards.desc: Automatic answers about pricing, club rules, and available services via OpenAI

cards.title: Admin panel
cards.desc: Administrator sees up-to-date bookings without manual data entry

cards.title: Reminders
cards.desc: Automatic reminders about upcoming bookings one hour before start

assistant.title: Personal Assistant
assistant.subtitle: AI planner in Telegram with voice control

psr.problem: Daily calendar, email, and task management takes a lot of time. Manual entry of meetings and reminders leads to errors and missed important events.
psr.solution: Telegram bot with voice command recognition, integration with Google Calendar, Gmail, and contacts. Automatic creation of meetings and reminders from voice messages.
psr.result: Saves 2+ hours per day on routine tasks. All meetings and tasks are entered automatically. Convenient interface within familiar Telegram.

psr.problem: Manually creating posts for a Telegram channel takes a lot of time. You need to read the article, extract key points, pick an image, write text, and publish.
psr.solution: The service automatically extracts content from a link, generates post text via AI, creates an image, and publishes to Telegram after confirmation.
psr.result: Saves 5 hours per week on content creation. Consistent publication rhythm without manual work.

psr.problem: The audio service offered track splitting into stems, but the process was entirely manual. Clients waited for operator responses, and payments were done via bank transfers without automation.
psr.solution: Telegram bot automatically accepts audio files, processes them through the service API, accepts payment via Robokassa, and delivers the finished stems.
psr.result: Full service automation. 24/7 payment acceptance without human involvement. Instant delivery of finished materials.

cards.desc: Client sends an audio file directly to the Telegram bot

cards.title: Scenario selection
cards.desc: Split into 2, 4, or 5 stems — your choice

cards.title: Automatic payment
cards.desc: Robokassa integration — pay by card or SBP

cards.title: Results delivery
cards.desc: Finished stems are sent via Telegram after processing

cards.desc: Order history and access to previous works

cards.desc: Processing statuses: "Accepted", "In progress", "Ready"

hrNeuro.title: HR Neuro-Employee
hrNeuro.subtitle: Hiring automation: 8000+ responses, 1166 hours saved for HR

psr.problem: The HR department spent 40+ hours per week manually processing applications from HeadHunter. Thousands of applications per month required manual processing, and HR managers wasted time on unsuitable candidates.
psr.solution: AI bot that automatically processes applications, conducts initial qualification, and tracks everything in Google Sheets. Instant response to applications 24/7, scripted questions, filtering out non-target candidates.
psr.result: 8000+ applications received, 3500+ candidates automatically processed, 1166 hours saved for the HR department. Hiring cycle reduced from 2 weeks to 3-4 days.

cards.title: Auto-application processing
cards.desc: Instant response to new applications from HeadHunter 24/7 without human involvement

cards.title: Candidate qualification
cards.desc: Asks scripted follow-up questions to determine fit for the position requirements

cards.title: Google Sheets tracking
cards.desc: All responses and statuses logged in a unified spreadsheet for the HR department

cards.title: Application filtering
cards.desc: Automatic identification of non-target candidates and filtering out unsuitable ones

cards.title: HR notifications
cards.desc: Warm candidates forwarded to HR manager with a ready-made dossier

cards.title: Communication history
cards.desc: Complete history of all interactions with each candidate

holyScriptures.title: Day with Prayer
holyScriptures.subtitle: Viritsa Prayer Book — daily prayer practice app

psr.problem: Believers struggled with regular prayer practice: forgetting to read prayers, lacking convenient access to the prayer book during the day, especially away from home.
psr.solution: "Day with Prayer" mobile app with daily prayer rule, prayer time notifications, and the complete Viritsa Prayer Book in your pocket.
psr.result: Convenient daily prayer practice app, accessible anytime and anywhere. Over 100 prayers in the database.
